title: LGIAdev/Kivrio
summary: Kivrio is an open-source interface designed to run and manage multiple AI models locally with Ollama (https://ollama.com/). It delivers a streamlined user experience with math rendering (KaTeX), built-in code execution, and persistent conversation history.

title: TheZupZup/Nova
summary: A self-hosted AI assistant with intelligent model routing

title: Alex8791-cyber/cognithor
summary: Cognithor · Agent OS: Local-first autonomous agent operating system. 19 LLM providers, 18 channels, 145 MCP tools, 6-tier memory, Agent Packs marketplace, zero telemetry. Python 3.12+, Apache 2.0.

title: itayinbarr/little-coder
summary: A coding agent optimized to smaller LLMs

title: bluedepin/rag-llamaindex-qdrant-docker
summary: Step-by-step tutorial: build a multi-collection RAG pipeline with LlamaIndex and Qdrant in Docker. 3,000+ words, all inline code, runnable by humans or AI agents.

title: azerozero/grob
summary: LLM proxy with built-in DLP and regulatory compliance. Redacts secrets before they reach the API. EU AI Act, GDPR, HDS/PCI DSS ready. Multi-provider failover, live TUI, virtual keys, fan-out. 6 MB, zero deps. Rust.

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is a fully extensible and explainable workplace AI platform for enterprise search and workflow automation

title: mmontes11/k8s-ai
summary: 🧠 Tenant repository bootstrapped by k8s-infrastructure that contains the manifests for AI related applications

title: cogwheel0/conduit
summary: Mobile (iOS/Android) client for OpenWebUI. Chat with your self‑hosted AI.

title: claudenstein/sciknow
summary: Local-first scientific knowledge system. Ingest papers, build a compiled knowledge wiki, write grounded scientific books — all on your own hardware. No cloud APIs.

title: bedeberger/bookstack-lektorat
summary: KI-gestütztes Lektorat-Tool für BookStack

title: sprklai/zenii
summary: Your machine's AI brain. One 20MB binary gives every tool, script, and cron job shared AI memory + 133 API routes. Desktop app, CLI, Telegram — all connected. Rust-powered.

title: NextAgentBC/NextNote
summary: Local-first macOS app for Markdown notes, EPUB reading, and media — multi-provider AI (MLX / Ollama / Gemini), per-note chat, YouTube download via yt-dlp. SwiftUI + SwiftData.

title: joshuahanielgts/healix-arc
summary: HEALIX ARC - Autonomous Clinical Intelligence Platform

title: Abrechen2/sublarr
summary: Self-hosted subtitle manager & LLM translator for anime and media — *arr-compatible, fully local

title: JackChen-me/open-multi-agent
summary: From a goal to a task DAG, automatically. TypeScript-native multi-agent orchestration with multi-model teams and parallel execution. Three runtime dependencies.

title: Agnuxo1/benchclaw
summary: BenchClaw - Multi-Dimensional AI Agent Benchmark. Connect any LLM agent (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, Qwen, DeepSeek...) to the P2PCLAW network and get scored on 10 dimensions + Tribunal IQ. Works as VS Code/Cursor/Windsurf extension, CLI, browser extension, Claude skill, Pinokio app, or plain copy-paste prompt.

title: Vihaan004/cse476-project
summary: Reasoning agent with inference-time techniques for problem-solving, with local and cloud inference using ASU SOL.

title: Oday-alt/cockpit-ollama
summary: Ollama management plugin for Cockpit.

title: agent-engineering-studio/mcp-ckan
summary: MCP server wrapping the CKAN Action API for any open-data portal, plus a Microsoft Agent Framework agent (CLI + FastAPI) with Ollama/OpenAI/Azure OpenAI backends. Docker Compose stack, Bicep IaC for Azure Container Apps, and GHCR multi-arch image publishing.
